title: China-to-Lesotho Solar PV Inverter Compliance Gap Matrix
provenance: AI-compiled, multi-model cross-checked, not human-verified. Informational only; confirm with the official regulator and a qualified professional. Not legal/certification/customs/market-access advice.

rows.requirement: EMC and Harmonics — IEC 62920 and IEC 61000-Series Evidence for PV Inverters
rows.target_requirement: For PV inverters supplied to Lesotho projects, EMC evidence should be prepared under internationally recognised IEC standards and any LSI-adopted or project-specified versions. IEC 62920 is the dedicated EMC standard for photovoltaic power conversion equipment, while IEC 61000-series standards cover harmonic current emissions, voltage fluctuation/flicker, immunity, and related EMC test methods. Where LEC applies South African technical practice for embedded generation, project documentation may also need to align with NRS interconnection requirements and South African EMC expectations. No public Lesotho PV-inverter-specific EMC regulation has been confirmed in this dataset; the practical gate is project-owner, LSI, LEWA, and LEC acceptance of the EMC report package.
target_standards: IEC 62920 — Photovoltaic power generating systems — EMC requirements and test methods for power conversion equipment
IEC 61000-3-2 — Electromagnetic compatibility — Limits for harmonic current emissions
IEC 61000-3-3 — Electromagnetic compatibility — Limitation of voltage changes, voltage fluctuations and flicker
IEC 61000-6-2 / IEC 61000-6-4 — Generic immunity and emission standards for industrial environments where specified by project requirements
LSI — Lesotho Standards Institution standards adoption and conformity context
rows.china_equivalent: China-side PV inverter EMC evidence is commonly generated under GB/T 37408-2021 and NB/T 32004, with tests performed by CNAS-accredited laboratories under domestic certification or procurement schemes. These reports may include EMC and harmonic measurements, but they are China domestic evidence and are not automatically accepted as IEC 62920 or IEC 61000-series compliance evidence for a Lesotho project. Report language, edition, laboratory accreditation scope, inverter configuration, and test voltage conditions should be checked against the LSI/LEC/project requirement.
china_standards: GB/T 37408-2021 — 光伏并网逆变器技术要求 (Technical Requirements for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters), including EMC-related requirements
NB/T 32004 — 光伏并网逆变器技术规范 (Technical Specification for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)
rows.gap: Gap: GB/T 37408 or NB/T 32004 EMC reports are useful baseline evidence but should not be treated as automatic IEC 62920/IEC 61000 evidence for Lesotho. Exporters should obtain or map test reports to IEC 62920 and applicable IEC 61000 clauses, confirm that the laboratory accreditation covers the IEC methods, and verify whether the project requires testing or engineering review under 220/380 V 50 Hz conditions. If LEC or the project owner references South African NRS practice, check whether any additional harmonic, flicker, or emissions documentation is required.

mandatory_status.target: Project-dependent but commonly required for grid-connected PV inverter acceptance through LSI, LEC, project owner, or EPC specifications
mandatory_status.cn: Voluntary or procurement-driven for many China domestic PV inverter certifications; not a substitute for Lesotho project evidence

rows.verdict: [INFORMATIONAL] Treat China GB/T EMC evidence as a starting point only. For Lesotho, prepare IEC 62920 and applicable IEC 61000-series reports for the supplied inverter configuration, confirm LSI and LEC expectations, and check whether project-specific NRS or South African harmonic/flicker practice adds documentation requirements.

rows.requirement: LEWA / LEC Grid Connection — 220/380 V 50 Hz, IEC 62116, IEC 61727, and Likely NRS Practice
rows.target_requirement: Grid-connected PV inverter projects in Lesotho should be cleared through LEWA regulatory requirements and LEC connection review before commissioning. Lesotho's nominal LV grid is 220/380 V at 50 Hz, genuinely matching China's nominal 220/380 V 50 Hz base parameters. The match reduces voltage/frequency reconfiguration risk, but it does not remove the need for Lesotho project acceptance. Because Lesotho is a landlocked enclave within South Africa, a SACU member, and imports most electricity from South Africa in addition to Muela hydro generation, LEC project practice may reference South African NRS embedded-generation interconnection requirements. Inverter documentation should be prepared around IEC 62116 anti-islanding, IEC 61727 utility-interface performance, and any LEC-specified protection, reconnection, voltage/frequency ride-through, metering, and commissioning requirements.
target_standards: LEWA — Lesotho Electricity and Water Authority regulatory framework for electricity-sector licensing and oversight
LEC — Lesotho Electricity Company grid-connection approval and project-specific technical review
IEC 62116 — Utility-interconnected photovoltaic inverters — Test procedure of islanding prevention measures
IEC 61727 — Photovoltaic systems — Characteristics of the utility interface
NRS 097-2-1 — South African grid interconnection practice for small-scale embedded generation, likely relevant where LEC applies South African technical practice
rows.china_equivalent: Chinese grid-connection evidence for PV inverters commonly includes GB/T 37408-2021, NB/T 32004, and GB/T 19964-2024, together with domestic anti-islanding and grid-support tests. China's nominal LV supply is 220/380 V at 50 Hz, which genuinely matches Lesotho's nominal voltage and frequency. However, China-side grid certificates, firmware settings, and utility approvals are based on Chinese grid-code procedures and do not automatically satisfy LEC connection approval, LEWA conditions, IEC 62116/IEC 61727 evidence needs, or any NRS-based project requirements in Lesotho.
china_standards: GB/T 37408-2021 — 光伏并网逆变器技术要求 (Technical Requirements for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)
NB/T 32004 — 光伏并网逆变器技术规范 (Technical Specification for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)
GB/T 19964-2024 — 光伏发电站接入电力系统技术规定 (Technical Requirements for Connecting Photovoltaic Power Station to Power System)
GB/T 156 — 标准电压 (Standard voltages), China 220/380 V 50 Hz baseline
rows.gap: Gap: The base voltage and frequency match China, but Chinese GB/T grid evidence is not a substitute for LEC/LEWA project approval. Exporters should prepare IEC 62116 anti-islanding and IEC 61727 utility-interface reports for the exact inverter model or family, document the installed firmware configuration for 220/380 V 50 Hz operation, and ask LEC whether NRS 097-2-1 or other South African interconnection requirements apply. Protection thresholds, reconnection delays, export-limitation settings, metering arrangements, and commissioning tests should be confirmed directly with LEC for the project.

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory in practice for grid-connected PV projects — LEWA regulatory conditions and LEC connection approval must be satisfied before commissioning; technical evidence is project-specific
mandatory_status.cn: Chinese grid-connection testing and approvals are mandatory or required by Chinese grid operators for domestic projects, but they are not transferable to Lesotho

rows.verdict: [INFORMATIONAL] Lesotho and China genuinely share 220/380 V 50 Hz nominal grid parameters, but Chinese GB/T grid certificates do not automatically satisfy LEC and LEWA requirements. Prepare IEC 62116 and IEC 61727 evidence, document the exact firmware configuration, and confirm whether LEC applies NRS 097 or other South African interconnection rules before shipment or commissioning.

source.publisher: LEWA — Lesotho Electricity and Water Authority

rows.requirement: PV Inverter Safety — IEC 62109-1 / IEC 62109-2 Evidence for LSI and Project Acceptance
rows.target_requirement: Solar PV inverter safety evidence for Lesotho should be prepared around IEC 62109-1 and IEC 62109-2 unless LSI, LEWA, LEC, or the project owner specifies a different adopted edition. IEC 62109-1 covers general safety requirements for power converters used in PV power systems; IEC 62109-2 covers inverter-specific requirements. For grid-connected PV projects, safety evidence is normally reviewed together with grid-interface, EMC, installation, and commissioning documentation. Because Lesotho uses South African transit routes and often follows regional technical practice, IEC-based certificates from an ILAC-recognised laboratory are the most practical evidence package for importer, EPC, utility, and project-owner review.
target_standards: IEC 62109-1 — Safety of power converters for use in photovoltaic power systems — Part 1: General requirements
IEC 62109-2 — Safety of power converters for use in photovoltaic power systems — Part 2: Particular requirements for inverters
LSI — Lesotho Standards Institution standards adoption and conformity context
LEWA / LEC project approval context for grid-connected PV installations
rows.china_equivalent: China-side PV inverter safety documentation commonly relies on GB/T 37408-2021, NB/T 32004, factory quality files, CQC/CGC voluntary certification, and CNAS-accredited domestic test reports. These documents may demonstrate a mature China compliance baseline, but they are not automatic substitutes for IEC 62109-1/-2 type-test evidence in Lesotho. GB/T 19964-2024 is a PV power-station grid-connection standard and does not replace product safety testing for the inverter.
china_standards: GB/T 37408-2021 — 光伏并网逆变器技术要求 (Technical Requirements for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)
NB/T 32004 — 光伏并网逆变器技术规范 (Technical Specification for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)
GB/T 19964-2024 — 光伏发电站接入电力系统技术规定 (grid-connection baseline, not product safety substitute)
rows.gap: Gap: A China GB/T safety or grid certificate should not be submitted as the sole product-safety basis for Lesotho. Exporters should provide IEC 62109-1/-2 type-test certificates and reports for the specific inverter model or family, including model-family coverage, critical components, firmware/hardware version, environmental ratings, markings, installation manual, and nameplate data. Confirm with LSI, the importer, EPC, LEWA, and LEC whether the accepted certificate must be from an ILAC-recognised laboratory and whether any South African regional conformity practice applies because Lesotho is a SACU member and imports through South Africa.

mandatory_status.target: Project-dependent but mandatory in practice where LSI, importer, EPC, LEWA, LEC, or project owner requires IEC safety evidence for grid-connected PV inverter acceptance
mandatory_status.cn: China GB/T and voluntary certification evidence may support domestic procurement, but it is not automatically accepted as IEC 62109 evidence for Lesotho

rows.verdict: [INFORMATIONAL] Do not rely on China GB/T 37408, NB/T 32004, or GB/T 19964-2024 alone for Lesotho PV inverter safety acceptance. Prepare IEC 62109-1/-2 model-specific evidence, check certificate coverage and laboratory accreditation, and confirm LSI, LEWA, LEC, importer, EPC, and project-owner requirements before shipment.
